login.heroTitle: Enter the agent's official recommendation dashboard.
login.heroDescription: Access your Inbox, Repository, campaign history, and audits using the platform's secure session.
login.title: Login
login.description: Use your platform credentials to continue.
login.haveAccountDescription: Use Login with your email and password.
login.needAccountDescription: Request access so an administrator can review and provision your account.
login.receivedActivationDescription: Activate your account once by creating your password.
login.activationRequiredMessage: This account exists but still needs activation. Use your activation token or activation link to activate the account before logging in.
account.firstAccessHeroDescription: Your account has already been created by an administrator. Create your password to activate it.
account.firstAccessHeroApproved: The activation token belongs to the approved account request and can only be used once.
account.firstAccessHeroOnce: After activation, use your email and new password to log in to the Career Scout Platform.
account.firstAccessWorkspace: After creating your password, you will have immediate access to your Workspace.
account.forgotPasswordHeroDescription: Request a reset token and use it to define a new password securely.
account.resetPasswordHeroDescription: Use your reset token to restore access and return to the login screen.
account.firstAccessDescription: Use the activation token sent by your administrator, or open the activation link you received. This step happens only once.
account.activateAccountContextCreated: Your account was created by an administrator.
account.activateAccountContextToken: Your activation token was generated for this account.
account.activateAccountContextLink: You can paste the token or use the activation link.
account.activateAccountLoginAfter: After activation, use Login with your email and password.
account.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your account e-mail to request a reset token.
account.resetPasswordDescription: Paste your reset token and define a new password.
account.activationTokenHelp: You may receive this token from the administrator or through an activation link.
account.activationTokenCreatePassword: Create your password to activate the account.
account.changePasswordDescription: Confirm your current password and define a new secure password.
account.changePasswordHelp: Use a password that satisfies every requirement. The dashboard checks the same rules enforced by the backend before sending the request.
account.firstAccessError: Unable to activate the account. Please check your activation token and try again.
account.firstAccessSuccess: Password created. Your account is active. Redirecting to login...
account.forgotPasswordError: Unable to request the reset token.
account.resetTokenGenerated: Reset token generated. Use it on the reset password page.

agentSettings.title: Agent Settings
agentSettings.description: Administrative registry for future agent configuration. Phase 1 is observational only and does not change runtime behavior.
agentSettings.search: Search by key, source, or description
agentSettings.selectSetting: Select a setting to view details.
candidateProfile.title: Candidate Profile
candidateProfile.description: This career profile belongs to the authenticated user and remains separate from the IAM user profile.
candidateProfile.foundation: Foundation only · not consumed by the agent yet
candidateProfile.resumeSourceDescription: Resumes are managed in the official Resume library and selected by Campaigns.
candidateProfile.linkedinSourceDescripti: LinkedIn sessions are managed in LinkedIn Accounts and used by Discovery.
resumes.title: Resumes
resumes.description: Manage the authenticated user's resume library. Phase 1 does not feed these files into the agent yet.
resumes.libraryDescription: Official platform resume repository owned by the authenticated user.
resumes.selectFileRequired: Select a PDF or DOCX file before uploading.
linkedinAccounts.title: LinkedIn Accounts
linkedinAccounts.description: Manage the authenticated user's LinkedIn accounts. Phase 1 does not feed these sessions into Discovery yet.
linkedinAccounts.storageStateHelp: Paste the storage_state JSON. The API stores it through the encryption boundary and never returns it.
linkedinAccounts.libraryDescription: Official platform account repository owned by the authenticated user.
linkedinAccounts.storageStateProtected: Storage state is protected and hidden after save.
linkedinAccounts.enterpriseDescription: Manage authenticated LinkedIn sessions for the Discovery Agent without exposing browser session JSON to end users.
linkedinAccounts.notConnectedDescription: Connect your LinkedIn account to allow the Discovery Agent to search opportunities using an authenticated session.
linkedinAccounts.modalDescription: Select an authenticated LinkedIn session file. Career Scout stores the session securely and uses it only so the Discovery Agent can search with an authenticated browser state.
linkedinAccounts.fileHelp: Choose the exported authenticated session file. The JSON content is never displayed in the dashboard.
linkedinAccounts.updateUnavailable: No session refresh endpoint is available yet.
linkedinAccounts.enterpriseLibraryDescri: Review connected and disconnected LinkedIn accounts in one place.
linkedinAccounts.emptyConnectedMessage: Connect LinkedIn to give the Discovery Agent an authenticated session.
linkedinAccounts.fileReadFailed: Unable to read the selected LinkedIn session file.
linkedinAccounts.selectFileError: Select a storage_state.json file before connecting LinkedIn.
linkedinAccounts.passwordHelp: The password is sent only for this login attempt and is never stored or returned by Career Scout.
linkedinAccounts.passwordRequired: Enter the LinkedIn password before connecting.
linkedinAccounts.defaultFailed: Unable to update default LinkedIn account.
linkedinAccounts.singleAccountDescriptio: Connect your LinkedIn account once so the Discovery Agent can search with an authenticated session.
linkedinAccounts.noAccountSimpleDescript: Connect your LinkedIn account to enable authenticated searches.
campaignProfiles.title: Campaign Profiles
campaignProfiles.description: Create user-owned campaign configuration profiles that connect a Candidate Profile, Resume, LinkedIn Account, and search preferences. Phase 1 does not feed these profiles into the agent yet.
campaignProfiles.name: Profile name
campaignProfiles.missingReferences: Create a Candidate Profile, active Resume, and active LinkedIn Account before creating a Campaign Profile.
campaignProfiles.libraryDescription: Official platform campaign configuration repository owned by the authenticated user.
campaignProfiles.candidateProfileRequire: Save a Candidate Profile before creating a Campaign Profile.
campaignProfiles.referencesRequired: Select an active Resume and LinkedIn Account.
campaignProfiles.defaultFailed: Unable to update default Campaign Profile.
campaignRun.confirmDescription: Start a new agent execution using this Campaign Profile.
campaignRun.progressConnecting: Connecting LinkedIn and preparing the campaign context.

agentExecutions.description: Inspect campaigns already executed by Career Scout without recalculating any decision.

agentExecutions.emptyDescription: No persisted executions match the selected filters.
agentExecutions.notFoundDescription: The requested execution could not be found.
agentExecutions.reportPendingDescription: The campaign has started. The persisted execution report will appear when the backend publishes it.

discoverySources.title: Discovery Sources
discoverySources.description: Organize user-owned LinkedIn Jobs searches by keywords and location. Career Scout generates the LinkedIn URL automatically.
discoverySources.formDescription: Define what to search for. Career Scout generates the LinkedIn Jobs URL internally.
discoverySources.name: Search name
discoverySources.nameHint: Optional. When empty, the name is generated from keywords and location.
discoverySources.libraryDescription: Review, edit, activate, and deactivate LinkedIn Jobs searches owned by this user.
discoverySources.emptyMessage: Create a Discovery Source with keywords and location to organize LinkedIn Jobs searches.
discoverySources.noAccounts: Connect a LinkedIn Account before creating Discovery Sources.
discoverySources.statusFailed: Unable to update Discovery Source status.
discoverySources.prefilledFromCandidateP: Pre-filled from your Candidate Profile. You can edit these values for this specific search.
campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Run configured campaigns quickly, review their setup, or open the wizard when configuration changes are needed.
campaigns.loadingDescription: Loading Campaign Profiles and execution context.
campaigns.candidateWarning: Unable to load Candidate Profile details. Campaigns remain available.
campaigns.resumeWarning: Unable to load Resume details. Campaigns remain available.
campaigns.linkedinWarning: Unable to load LinkedIn Account details. Campaigns remain available.
campaigns.discoverySourcesWarning: Unable to load Discovery Sources. Campaigns remain available, but readiness may be incomplete.
campaigns.executionsWarning: Unable to load recent executions. Campaigns remain available.
campaigns.emptyDescription: Create a Campaign before running executions from the Dashboard.
campaigns.addDiscoverySourceBeforeRun: Add an active Discovery Source for this LinkedIn account before running this campaign.
campaigns.name: Name
campaigns.discoverySourcesUnavailableDes: Unable to load Discovery Sources right now. Campaign execution remains available.
campaigns.noActiveDiscoverySourcesDescri: This Campaign does not have active Discovery Sources for its LinkedIn Account.
campaigns.defaultFailed: Unable to update the default Campaign.
campaigns.archiveDescription: Archive "{name}"? It will no longer be available for new executions.
campaigns.firstSetupDescription: Complete the required setup before running your first Campaign. Each step opens the exact screen you need next.
campaigns.readyToRunDescription: Everything is configured. You can execute your Campaign now.
campaigns.setupCandidateMissing: Create the profile used to match opportunities.
campaigns.setupResumeCompleted: At least one active resume is available.
campaigns.setupResumeMissing: Upload the resume that should be used by Campaigns.
campaigns.setupLinkedinCompleted: At least one LinkedIn account is connected.
campaigns.setupLinkedinMissing: Connect LinkedIn so Discovery can search with an authenticated session.
campaigns.setupDiscoverySourcesMissing: Create at least one active source for the LinkedIn searches.
campaigns.setupDiscoverySourcesBlocked: Connect LinkedIn before creating Discovery Sources.
campaigns.setupCampaignCompleted: At least one active Campaign is configured.
campaigns.setupCampaignMissing: Create the Campaign that connects Candidate, Resume, LinkedIn, and search preferences.
campaigns.setupCampaignBlocked: Complete Candidate, Resume, and LinkedIn before creating the Campaign.
campaigns.setupCampaignNeedsSources: Campaign exists, but none of the active Campaigns has an active Discovery Source for its LinkedIn account.
resumeOptimization.title: Resume Optimization
resumeOptimization.description: Historical resume coverage, skill gaps, and deterministic optimization signals from persisted platform data.
resumeOptimization.emptyDescription: Resume optimization metrics are not available yet.
resumeOptimization.skillPriorityUnavaila: Skill priority data is not available yet.
resumeOptimization.coverageImprovementDe: Comparison between current resume coverage and estimated coverage after adding priority skills.
resumeOptimization.topSkillsDescription: Skills found in the resume and ordered by historical market frequency.
resumeOptimization.missingSkillsDescript: Skills repeatedly marked as missing in persisted recommendation evidence.
resumeOptimization.skillsPriorityDescrip: Deterministic ranking of skills to prioritize based on gaps and market frequency.
resumeOptimization.marketFrequencyDescri: Frequency of each skill across historical opportunities.
resumeOptimization.dataUnavailable: Resume optimization data is not available yet.
resumeOptimization.missingSkillDataUnava: Historical missing skill data is not available yet.
resumeOptimization.marketFrequencyUnavai: Market skill frequency data is not available yet.
resumeOptimization.onboardingTitle: Your resume has been uploaded successfully.
resumeOptimization.onboardingDescription: Resume Optimization is not available yet because Career Scout has not analyzed the job market for your profile. Unlike traditional resume checkers, Career Scout compares your resume against real job opportunities before generating recommendations. Run your first Campaign to begin this analysis.
resumeOptimization.noInsightsTitle: Why are there no insights yet?
resumeOptimization.noInsightsDescription: Resume Optimization does not evaluate your resume in isolation. Career Scout first compares your resume with real job opportunities. Because no Campaign has been executed yet, there is not enough market evidence to generate meaningful recommendations.
resumeOptimization.firstCampaignTitle: What happens during your first Campaign?
resumeOptimization.stepCompareMarket: Compare your profile against the market
resumeOptimization.afterCampaignTitle: Once your first Campaign finishes, this page will automatically display:
resumeOptimization.processingDescription: The Discovery Agent is currently collecting market information. Optimization insights will appear automatically when the Campaign finishes.
resumeOptimization.metricContextDescript: These indicators are based on the resume, completed Campaigns, and market evidence collected from real opportunities.
resumeOptimization.completenessNeedsAtte: ⚠ Certifications or summary may need attention
resumeOptimization.coverageContextAvaila: Coverage reflects how many market skills found in completed Campaigns are already represented in the resume.
resumeOptimization.coverageContextUnavai: Coverage will be calculated after analyzing Campaign opportunities with skill evidence.
resumeOptimization.improvementContextAva: Improvement estimates the expected coverage gain from adding prioritized missing skills.
resumeOptimization.improvementContextUna: Improvement opportunities will appear when the platform detects repeated missing skills.

campaignSetup.description: Configure the Campaign. Saving this setup does not start an Agent execution.
campaignSetup.prefillHelp: Some values are prefilled from your Candidate Profile and connected resources. Review them here only when this Campaign needs different search preferences.
campaignSetup.simpleHelp: Most settings were automatically loaded from your Career Profile. You only need to give this Campaign a name and define its search objective. Open Advanced Settings only if this Campaign should use different preferences.
campaignSetup.inheritedDescription: These settings were loaded from the resources you already configured.
campaignSetup.advancedDescription: Override inherited settings only when this Campaign needs a different resume, LinkedIn account, or search preference.
campaignSetup.makeDefaultHelp: Future Campaign executions will use this Campaign by default.

agentExecutions.executionMetricsDescript: Stage durations reported by existing execution artifacts.
agentExecutions.topRecommendedDescriptio: Opportunities classified as APPLY by the persisted Decision output.
agentExecutions.noApplyOpportunitiesDesc: This execution does not include persisted opportunities classified as APPLY.
